criteriaResults.evidence: Escalating-usage client crosses threshold on turn 5: summarizerCalls===1; final chat call's messages deep-equal [summary, t3/t4/t5 assistant+toolResult pairs] — one summary replacing head, tail verbatim.

Exactly one compact-boundary event {type, turn:5, messagesBefore:9, messagesAfter:5, inputTokensAtTrigger:100000} with onEvent; without onEvent compaction still happens (message inspection). loop-events.ts union member implements full 3-field payload.
Budget spies include summarizer's usage {5,7} and 0.02 USD; result.usage + costUsd equal sum of 6 turns PLUS summarizer contribution.
Summarizer throws -> run completes stopReason 'end', no summary message appears, final request still carries all 11 messages (nothing dropped). summarizeMessages returns undefined on rejection.
Absent config: summarizerCalls===0, 6 chats only; paired run with never-triggering config deep-equal to no-config run.

filesChanged.description: compact-boundary union member with {turn, messagesBefore, messagesAfter, inputTokensAtTrigger}; reserved comment now lists only text-delta.

Pure summarizeMessages -> CompactionOutcome {summaryMessage, usage, costUsd?} | undefined; serializes head to plain text (no raw tool blocks to a no-tools call), dedicated system prompt, bounded maxTokens 4096, fails open.

compaction? param; gated block between per-turn budget charge and exceeded() gate (summarizer charge caught by same post-turn check); trigger = tool_use stop && per-request inputTokens > threshold; in-place splice preserving tail identity; charges accumulators + budget; safeEmit compact-boundary.
5 new tests with CompactionScriptedClient (summarizer recognized by system prompt).
